title: Feedback
compiled_truth: Feedback is an external contact at [Intcx](companies/intcx). Over the corpus period (2001-09-27 to 2002-03-25), Feedback sent 91 and received 3 emails, totalling 94 interactions. Top correspondents: [Icehelpdesk](people/icehelpdesk-intcx) (47), [Sales](people/sales-intcx) (46), [Iceuserslist](people/iceuserslist-list) (43), [Powerindex](people/powerindex-list) (37), [Gasindex](people/gasindex-list) (11).
